passives.name: Atrophy
passives.effects: {{tip|Immobilize|Immobilizing}} effects against {{tip|champions}} have a {{pp|key=%|key1=%|type=critical strike chance|0 to 100 for 11|0 to 100|formula=1% per 1% critical strike chance, capped at 100% critical strike chance}} chance to increase in duration by {{fd|0.25}} seconds (+ 33% of immobilizing effect's duration).

effects_structured.raw: {{tip Immobilize Immobilizing}} effects against {{tip champions}} have a {{pp key=% key1=% type=critical strike chance 0 to 100 for 11 0 to 100 formula=1% per 1% critical strike chance, capped at 100% critical strike chance}} chance to increase in duration by {{fd 0.25}} seconds (+ 33% of immobilizing effect's duration).

schema_notes.effects_structured: Parsed from passive/active text for simulation use.
context_notes: Execution model: Atrophy applies a chance-gated immobilize extension with chance equal to critical strike chance percent (1% chance per 1% critical strike chance), capped at 100%.
Player-visible behavior: successful procs extend qualifying immobilize effects by a flat 0.25 seconds and by 33% of the original immobilize duration.
Page notes state suppression and stasis are excluded from Atrophy extension semantics.

Availability/economy note: this distributed item is Arena-scoped and acquired through distributed systems (for example anvils, augments, or round rewards) rather than standard shop purchase; Tier-1 datasets expose reconciliation economy values (total 1000 / sell 400).
